text:
If a mirror check that doesn't land is familiar, this body image pattern needs a better reset.

Try this. Turn away from the mirror, name one thing your body let you do today. And get dressed for that. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. A body is something you live in, not a project that is always overdue.
mediaAltText: Faceless vertical short on body_image (broll + CosyVoice bank VO)
acceptance_layer: system working — Metricool dry-run only (not live publish)
